examples: These prices have prompted many people in the industry feats of rhetorical self - flagellation.
They need not be engaged in self-flagellation to prove to you or anyone else that they are in the act of improving.
They are not about to engage in mutual flagellation. The new rules will not be retrospective, and many sanctions will not bite until 2013.
Self-flagellation over global warming sins is all the rage these days, and high-tech is no exception.
Sadly this has become an expected part of the self-flagellation we put ourselves through as a sector.
